name: code-reviewer
tagline: Guides the agent through a structured code review of local diffs or GitHub PRs with defined feedback sections.
verdict: Clear checkout/diff steps and a defined output structure (Summary/Findings/Conclusion) make it usable; missing scope exclusions, no handling for common tool failures (checkout conflicts, missing preflight script), no declared prerequisites, and no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No exclusions / 'NOT for' guidance stated anywhere.
No failure handling for gh pr checkout conflicts, a failing/missing npm run preflight, or absent gh auth.
Uses gh and a project-specific 'npm run preflight' without declaring or checking availability first.
